title: 6 INSANE Claude Cowork Use Cases to Save Hours (AI Workflow Automation)
summary: YouTube tutorial demonstrating six Claude Cowork workflows for automation use cases including morning briefing, content generation, inbox triage, research reports, interactive dashboards, and mobile agent control. The video showcases practical applications of agentic AI for reducing manual work.
writeup: This tutorial walks through six Claude Cowork workflows aimed at automating manual tasks: morning briefing, content generation, inbox triage, research reports, interactive dashboards, and mobile agent control. It matters as a concrete look at applying agentic AI and tool use to routine work. The takeaways are the six use cases themselves, each demonstrated as a practical application for cutting time spent on repetitive tasks.
